why_this_action: The current hold window still has no truthful do-now packet, and the outcome runner was blurring strategic lane truth with executed action truth. Splitting those states now is the highest-leverage same-run repair because it prevents fake-green follow-through before the 2026-05-27T14:26:29 release.
shared_findings_reused: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
distribution_lane_latest.json: owned_content remains the strategic hold-window lane
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: conversion_to_free_use is still the bottleneck
outcome_execution_board_latest.json: pre-fix payload implied an action type even when execution was absent
expected_outcome: Later loops and verifiers can distinguish a strategic hold-window lane from an actually executed lane, reducing fake progress and improving post-hold lane selection.
measurement_window: Check the next active marketing pass after 2026-05-27T14:26:29+02:00 for truthful reuse of do_now_lane_available/executed_lane fields.
